The top of the floor is beyond the last step. You need to reach index n (past the array).
To reach step i, you pay either cost[i-1] + dp[i-1] or cost[i-2] + dp[i-2]. Take the minimum.
Base cases: dp[0] = 0, dp[1] = 0 (you can start at either step for free).
Only two previous values are needed, so optimize to O(1) space.
